---
title: "Software"
---


This section summarizes selected methodological and applied statistical projects.

## Main areas

- Small area estimation
- Household survey analysis
- Population modeling
- Social indicators
- Statistical capacity building

## Areas of expertise

- Household survey design and analysis
- Survey sampling
- Small area estimation
- Poverty and inequality measurement
- Small area estimation
- Multilevel models
- Official statistics
- Statistical capacity building
- Data analysis with R

## Current interests

I am particularly interested in the integration of survey data, administrative records, geospatial information, and statistical models to improve the production of social indicators at detailed geographic levels.

## Selected work

- Methodological work on household surveys and official statistics.
- Training materials on survey analysis with R.
- Applications of small area estimation for poverty and social indicators.
- Technical assistance to national statistical offices.
